-- SELECT TOP 100000 * FROM customer.ext_stg_closedclaims_claims_t
-- GO

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_incr_closedclaims_claims_t
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
AS
SELECT TOP 100000 * FROM customer.ext_stg_closedclaims_claims_t
OPTION (LABEL = 'CTAS : Load customer.stg_incr_closedclaims_claims_t')
;
